testimonials.quote: "Noty completely changed how I approach my daily journaling and project planning. It's the first tool that actually feels like an extension of my brain. The markdown editor is a dream and the organization system is pure genius."
"I've tried every note app out there, but Noty is the only one that stuck. The offline-first approach means I never lose a thought, and the sync is flawless. It's become my second brain."
"As a writer, I need tools that inspire rather than distract. Noty's minimal design and beautiful typography make me want to write more. I've doubled my daily output since switching."
